Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface BigDecimalVerifier

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,BigDecimal>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalVerifierImpl
public interface BigDecimalVerifier extends ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,BigDecimal>
Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectVerifier) imply ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isNotNull().

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
    precision()
    Returns a verifier for BigDecimal.precision().

    precision(Consumer<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

    scale()
    Returns a verifier for BigDecimal.scale().
    BigDecimalVerifier
    scale(Consumer<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<Integer>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberVerifier

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • precision

      BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier precision()
      Returns a verifier for BigDecimal.precision().
      Returns:
      a verifier for BigDecimal.precision()

    • precision

      BigDecimalVerifier precision(Consumer<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the BigDecimal.precision()
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null

    • scale

      PrimitiveNumberVerifier<Integer> scale()
      Returns a verifier for BigDecimal.scale().
      Returns:
      a verifier for BigDecimal.scale()

    • scale

      BigDecimalVerifier scale(Consumer<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<Integer>> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the BigDecimal.scale()
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null
